Ironclad.name: Ironclad
Ironclad.description:
<c=bf3f43>IRONCLAD</c>
The remaining soldier of the Ironclads. His cards mostly give <c=keyword>temp shielding</c> and <c=keyword>exhaust</c> other cards.

Silent.name: Silent
Silent.description:
<c=6fc057>SILENT</c>
A deadly huntress from the foglands. Her cards are mostly <c=keyword>low cost</c> and <c=keyword>card manipulation</c>.

Defect.name: Defect
Defect.description:
<c=4b9fbf>DEFECT</c>
Combat automaton which became self-aware. Their cards mostly give <c=keyword>shielding</c> and create <c=keyword>orbs</c> in the midrow.

Watcher.name: Watcher
Watcher.description:
<c=924bbf>WATCHER</c>
A blind ascetic. Her cards set up strong <c=keyword>attacks</c> while leaving you <c=downside>equally vulnerable</c>.

Brimstone.name: BRIMSTONE
Brimstone.description: Gain 1 <c=status>OVERDRIVE</c> every turn. <c=downside>Your enemy also gains 1 <c=status>OVERDRIVE</c> every turn.</c>

CharonsAshes.name: CHARON'S ASHES
CharonsAshes.description: Whenever a card is <c=action>exhausted</c>, fire for 1 damage immediately.

MarkOfPain.name: MARK OF PAIN
MarkOfPain.description: Gain 1 extra <c=energy>ENERGY</c> every turn. <c=downside>At the start of combat, add 2 <c=card>Comm Jam</c> to your draw pile.</c>

RedSkull.name: RED SKULL
RedSkull.description: While you have no <c=status>SHIELD</c>, all of <c=bf3f43>Ironclad's</c> card attacks deal +1 damage.

HoveringKite.name: HOVERING KITE
HoveringKite.description: The first time you <c=action>discard</c> a card each turn, gain 1 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.

Tingsha.name: TINGSHA
Tingsha.description: Whenever you <c=action>discard</c> a card during your turn, fire for 1 damage immediately.

ToughBandages.name: TOUGH BANDAGES
ToughBandages.description: Whenever you <c=action>discard</c> a card during your turn, gain 1 <c=status>TEMP SHIELD</c>.

WristBlade.name: WRIST BLADE
WristBlade.description: All attacks from 0-cost cards deal +1 damage.

EmotionChip.name: EMOTION CHIP
EmotionChip.description: Once per combat, when you lose hull, gain 1 <c=status>PERFECT SHIELD</c>.

GoldCables.name: GOLD-PLATED CABLES
GoldCables.description: Every 4 <c=4b9fbf>Defect</c> cards played, draw a card.

NuclearBattery.name: NUCLEAR BATTERY
NuclearBattery.description: Gain 2 <c=status>POWER CORE</c> on the first turn.

RunicCapacitor.name: RUNIC CAPACITOR
RunicCapacitor.description: Gain stored <c=energy>ENERGY</c> on the first turn. At the end of combat, store unspent <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.

Duality.name: DUALITY
Duality.description: Whenever you play 2 <c=action>ATTACK</c> cards, gain 1 <c=status>TEMP SHIELD</c>.

BookOfTails.name: BOOK OF TAILS
BookOfTails.description: At start of turn, add a <c=cardtrait>temp</c> <c=card>Fox Tale</c> to your hand.

Counting.name: COUNTING
Counting.description: At start of turn, count sheeps. Once you counted 7 sheep, gain 1 <c=status>ENERGY</c> and start counting again.

DemoShip.name: DemoShip
DemoShip.description:
This is a demo ship.
 <c=boldPink>Isn't this cool?</c>

Rampage.name: Rampage
Rampage.title: Increase Damage
Rampage.description: Increase this card's damage by <c=keyword>{{Scale}}</c> until the end of combat.

SneakyStrike.name: Sneaky Strike
SneakyStrike.title: Conditional
SneakyStrike.description: If you have <c=action>discarded</c> a card this turn, perform the following action. <c=downside>Does nothing otherwise.</c>

DualCast.name: Dual Cast
DualCast.title: Catch
DualCast.description: Remove the <c=drone>midrow object</c> in front of your missile bay.
DualCast.description2: Launch <c=keyword>2</c> copies of the <c=drone>object</c> from your missile bay, <c=keyword>facing you</c>.
DualCast.description3: Launch <c=keyword>2</c> copies of the <c=drone>object</c> from your missile bay, <c=keyword>facing the enemy</c>.

Recursion.name: Recursion
Recursion.title: Copy
Recursion.description: Copy the <c=drone>midrow object</c> in front of your missile bay.
Recursion.description2: Launch a copy <c=keyword>1</c> space to the right of your missile bay, <c=keyword>facing you</c>.
Recursion.description3: Launch a copy <c=keyword>1</c> space to the right of your missile bay, <c=keyword>facing the enemy</c>.
Recursion.description4: Launch a copy <c=keyword>1</c> space to the left and right of your missile bay, <c=keyword>facing you</c>.
Recursion.description5: Launch a copy <c=keyword>1</c> space to the left and right of your missile bay, <c=keyword>facing the enemy</c>.

Streamline.name: Streamline
Streamline.title: Decrease Cost
Streamline.description: Decrease this card's <c=energy>energy</c> cost by <c=keyword>{{Scale}}</c> until the end of combat.

SandsOfTime.name: Sands Of Time
SandsOfTime.title: Decrease Cost
SandsOfTime.description: Decrease this card's <c=energy>energy</c> cost by <c=keyword>{{Scale}}</c> until the end of combat.

description.None: Attack for set amount = 3. On hit, apply 1 <c=status>BOOST</c>.
description.A: Attack for set amount = 4. On hit, apply 1 <c=status>BOOST</c>.
description.B: Attack for set amount = 5. On hit, apply 2 <c=status>BOOST</c>.

AutododgeLeftNextTurn.name: Autododge Left Next Turn
AutododgeLeftNextTurn.description: At the start of next turn, gain <c=boldPink>{0}</c> <c=status>AUTODODGE LEFT</c>.

BarricadeStatus.name: Barricade
BarricadeStatus.description: <c=status>TEMP SHIELD</c> is no longer lost at the start of your turn.

DoubleTapStatus.name: Double Tap
DoubleTapStatus.description: The next {0} <c=action>ATTACK</c> cards you play are played twice. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>

JuggernautStatus.name: Juggernaut
JuggernautStatus.description: Whenever you gain <c=status>SHIELD</c>, fire for {0} damage immediately.

NoDrawStatus.name: No Draw
NoDrawStatus.description: <c=downside>You may not draw additional cards this turn.</c>

PierceChargeStatus.name: Pierce Charge
PierceChargeStatus.description: Your next {0} attacks will pierce. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>
PierceChargeStatus.description2: Your next attack will pierce. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>

ReboundStatus.name: Rebound
ReboundStatus.description: The next {0} cards you play are put on the <c=deck>top</c> of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>

DrawUpStatus.name: Draw Up
DrawUpStatus.description: At the start of every turn, draw {0} additional cards.

DrawDownStatus.name: Draw Down
DrawDownStatus.description: <c=downside>At the start of every turn, draw</c> {0} <c=downside>fewer cards.</c>

CreativeAIStatus.name: Creative AI
CreativeAIStatus.description: At the start of every turn, gain {0} random cards that give a <c=status>status</c> and have <c=cardtrait>exhaust</c>.

HeatsinksStatus.name: Heatsinks
HeatsinksStatus.description: Draw {0} cards whenever you play a card that gives a <c=status>status</c> and has <c=cardtrait>exhaust</c>.

LockOnStatus.name: Lock-On
LockOnStatus.description: If you would miss a shot, the whole ship moves to align with the enemy. <c=downside>Decreases by 1 every time it triggers.</c>

EquilibriumStatus.name: Equilibrium
EquilibriumStatus.description: Your hand is not discarded at the end of your turn. <c=downside>Decreases by 1 each turn.</c>

MantraStatus.name: Mantra
MantraStatus.description: Whenever you acquire <c=keyword>5</c> <c=status>MANTRA</c>, add an extra cannon with <c=parttrait>ARMOR</c> to the middle of your ship until next turn.

WrathStatus.name: Wrath
WrathStatus.description:
Increases attack damage dealt <c=downside>and taken</c>.
Maximum <c=keyword>{{Max}}</c>.
Lose all <c=status>CALM</c>.
WrathStatus.description2: Deal <c=downside>and take</c> {0} extra damage from attacks. Lose all <c=status>CALM</c> when you gain this. Maximum <c=keyword>{{Max}}</c>.

CalmStatus.name: Calm
CalmStatus.description:
When lost, gain <c=status>ENERGY</c>.
Maximum <c=keyword>{{Max}}</c>.
Lose all <c=status>WRATH</c>.
CalmStatus.description2: When lost, gain {0} <c=status>ENERGY</c>. Lose all <c=status>WRATH</c> when you gain this. Maximum <c=keyword>{{Max}}</c>.

DivinityStatus.name: Divinity
DivinityStatus.description: You have {0} extra cannons. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>

MasterRealityStatus.name: Master Reality
MasterRealityStatus.description: Whenever a card is created during combat, <c=cardtrait>upgrade</c> it to <c=cardtrait>A</c>.

StudyStatus.name: Study
StudyStatus.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle {0} <c=action>Insight</c> into your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.

RageStatus.name: Rage
RageStatus.description: At the start of your next turn, gain {0} <c=status>WRATH</c>.

FeebledriveStatus.name: Drive Inhibitor
FeebledriveStatus.description: Remove {0} damage from all attacks. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>

AmplifyStatus.name: Amplify
AmplifyStatus.description: The next {0} cards you play are played twice. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>
AmplifyStatus.description2: The next cards you play are played twice. <c=downside>Goes away at start of next turn.</c>

ChargeStatus.name: Charge
ChargeStatus.description: A measure of latent power on the field. Maximum <c=keyword>{{Max}}</c>.

PowerCoreStatus.name: Power Core
PowerCoreStatus.description: Contributes <c=cardtrait>+</c>{1} <c=status>CHARGE</c>. Can be spent to play cards you lack up to {0} <c=energy>energy</c> for.
PowerCoreStatus.description2: Contributes <c=status>CHARGE</c>. Can be spent to play cards you lack the <c=energy>energy</c> for.

NoChargeStatus.name: Blackout
NoChargeStatus.description: <c=downside>You may not benefit from <c=status>CHARGE</c> this turn.</c>

ShivStatus.name: Shivs
ShivStatus.description: Whenever you attack, immediately fire a <c=keyword>1</c> damage <c=drone>projectile</c> from all unobstructed missile bays. <c=downside>Decreases by 1 every time it triggers.</c>

MoveSelectedCardToPile.textDrawPile: Pick a card to shuffle into your draw pile.
MoveSelectedCardToPile.descriptionDrawPile: Shuffle the card into your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
MoveSelectedCardToPile.textDeck: Pick a card to put on top of your draw pile.
MoveSelectedCardToPile.descriptionDeck: Put the card on the <c=deck>top</c> of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.

APlayTopCard.title: Top Card
APlayTopCard.description: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
APlayTopCard.description2: Play the card, at no <c=energy>energy</c> cost.
APlayTopCard.description3: Remove the card for the rest of this combat.

ATempUpgradeRandomCard.descriptionA: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> <c=keyword>{{Cards}}</c> random cards in your <c=deck>hand</c> to <c=cardtrait>A</c>.
ATempUpgradeRandomCard.descriptionB: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> <c=keyword>{{Cards}}</c> random cards in your <c=deck>hand</c> to <c=cardtrait>B</c>.
ATempUpgradeRandomCard.descriptionRandom: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> <c=keyword>{{Cards}}</c> random cards in your <c=deck>hand</c> to a random upgrade.
ATempUpgradeRandomCard.descriptionAHand: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> every card in your <c=deck>hand</c> to <c=cardtrait>A</c>.
ATempUpgradeRandomCard.descriptionBHand: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> every card in your <c=deck>hand</c> to <c=cardtrait>B</c>.
ATempUpgradeRandomCard.descriptionRandomHand: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> every card in your <c=deck>hand</c> to a random upgrade.

TempUpgradeSelectedCard.textA: Choose a card in your hand. Set its upgrade to A.
TempUpgradeSelectedCard.textB: Choose a card in your hand. Set its upgrade to B.
TempUpgradeSelectedCard.textDown: Choose a card in your hand. Downgrade it.
TempUpgradeSelectedCard.textRandom: Choose a card in your hand. Set it to a random upgrade.
TempUpgradeSelectedCard.descriptionRandom: <c=cardtrait>Temp upgrade</c> the card to a random upgrade.

ACascadingAddCard.descriptionDeckRandom: Shuffle a card into your <c=deck>draw pile</c>:
ACascadingAddCard.descriptionDiscard: Add a card to your <c=deck>discard pile</c>:
ACascadingAddCard.descriptionExhaust: Add a card to your <c=deck>exhaust pile</c>:
ACascadingAddCard.descriptionDeck: Put a card on the <c=deck>top</c> of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>:
ACascadingAddCard.descriptionDeck2: Put <c=keyword>{{Cards}}</c> cards on the <c=deck>top</c> of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>:

ACascadingCardSelect.descriptionDrawPile: Choose a card from your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
ACascadingCardSelect.descriptionDiscardPile: Choose a card from your <c=deck>discard pile</c>.
ACascadingCardSelect.descriptionExhaustPile: Choose a card from your <c=deck>exhaust pile</c>.
ACascadingCardSelect.descriptionDrawOrDiscardPile: Choose a card from your <c=deck>draw or discard piles</c>.

ADiscount.title: Discount
ADiscount.description: Reduce a random card's <c=energy>energy</c> cost by <c=keyword>{{Discount}}</c> until played, or until combat ends.
ADiscount.descriptionHand: Reduce the <c=energy>energy</c> cost of every card in your <c=deck>hand</c> by <c=keyword>{{Discount}}</c> until played, or until combat ends.

ADiscountTopCard.title: Top Card
ADiscountTopCard.description: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
ADiscountTopCard.description2: Reduce the card's <c=energy>energy</c> cost by <c=keyword>{{Discount}}</c> until played, or until combat ends.

AMultiCardSelect.descriptionDrawOrDiscardPile: Choose {{Cards}} cards from your <c=deck>draw or discard piles</c>.

ALaunchShiv.title: Fire
ALaunchShiv.description: Fire an <c=midrow>object</c> from your missile bay.

ATopDiscardContext.title: Top Card
ATopDiscardContext.description: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>discard pile</c>.

ACardContext.descriptionTopDraw: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
ACardContext.descriptionTopDiscard: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>discard pile</c>.
ACardContext.descriptionTopExhaust: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>exhaust pile</c>.
ACardContext.descriptionRandomDraw: Take a <c=deck>random</c> card from your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
ACardContext.descriptionRandomDiscard: Take a <c=deck>random</c> card from your <c=deck>discard pile</c>.
ACardContext.descriptionRandomExhaust: Take a <c=deck>random</c> card from your <c=deck>exhaust pile</c>.

ATorchEntireHand.title: Torch Hand
ATorchEntireHand.description: Send every card in your hand to the exhaust pile. Gain <c=status>HEAT</c> equal to cards exhausted.

APlayAndTorchTopCard.title: Top Card
APlayAndTorchTopCard.description: Take the <c=deck>top</c> card of your <c=deck>draw pile</c>.
APlayAndTorchTopCard.description2: Play the card, at no <c=energy>energy</c> cost.

AFission.title: Fission
AFission.description: Instantly destroy every <c=drone>object in the midrow</c>.

Limitless.title: Limitless
Limitless.description: This card can be <c=cardtrait>upgraded</c> any number of times.

PowerCoreDiscount.title: Core Discount
PowerCoreDiscount.description: This card can be played at the cost of <c=keyword>{{Amount}}</c> <c=status>POWER CORE</c>.
PowerCoreDiscount.descriptionAlt: This card has been discounted by <c=status>POWER CORE</c>.

ShivObject.title: Shiv
ShivObject.description: This "missile" is going to deal <c=damage>{{Damage}}</c> damage.

LightningObject.title: Lightning
LightningObject.description: Contributes <c=cardtrait>+1</c> <c=status>CHARGE</c>. Destroying it will shoot a <c=damage>{{Damage}}</c> damage shot at the enemy.

DarkObject.title: Dark
DarkObject.description: Destroying it will shoot a <c=damage>{{Damage}}</c> damage shot at the enemy. Damage increases by <c=damage>1</c> once per turn.

PlasmaObject.title: Plasma
PlasmaObject.description: Contributes <c=cardtrait>+1</c> <c=status>CHARGE</c>. Destroying it will give you <c=keyword>{{Energy}}</c> <c=status>ENERGY</c>.

ActionRequiredChargeResource.title: Charge Level
ActionRequiredChargeResource.description: Requires <c=keyword>{{Amount}}</c> <c=status>CHARGE</c>. If you don't have enough, this action doesn't happen.
